title: Ubiquiti UACC-Camera-AM-B, universal mount for UVC-G5-Turret-Ultra, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / Mounting boxes and brackets / Mounting boxes
description: UACC-Camera-AM is a universal holder for the UVC-G5-Turrer-Ultra camera. Thanks to the ingenious adapter system, the bracket can be used to mount the camera on a wall, corner or pipe . The holder is made of a combination of polycarbonate and aluminum alloy. There are cable entries for 3/4" pipe on both the top and the bottom side
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Designed for mast diameter [mm] 38 up to 50 Design On the wall, On the mast, Corner Purpose Outdoor Material Polycarbonate, Aluminum alloy Weight [g] 670 Width [mm] 115 Height [mm] 90 Depth [mm] 252 Color Black
